body.docName: 第三方对接回调批量审批单据
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/thirdPartCallback 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/thirdPartCallback 
 ## 接口描述 
费控系统中“推送外部系统”节点会将单据信息推送给外部系统，此时费控中单据会在该审批节点等待，外部系统审批后，需要调用该接口来处理费控中单据的审批状态 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"billList","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2024041714594536","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"status","required":true,"label":"%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%20%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%89%E6%96%B9%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%EF%BC%9A1-%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87%EF%BC%9B3-%E6%8B%92%E7%BB%9D%EF%BC%9BB-%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E","maxLength":"2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"remark","required":false,"label":"%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8","exampleValue":"%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87","desc":"%20%0D%0A%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E4%B8%BA%E6%8B%92%E7%BB%9D%E3%80%81%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%AE%A1%E6%A0%B8%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%AA%E4%BC%A0%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E4%BC%9A%E5%87%BA%E7%8E%B0%E5%A6%82%E4%B8%8B%E6%8A%A5%E9%94%99%EF%BC%9A%E6%8B%92%E7%BB%9D%E3%80%81%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%AE%A1%E6%A0%B8%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E3%80%82","maxLength":"120"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"backTypeFlag","label":"%E9%87%8D%E6%96%B0%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%200-%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E5%90%8E%E6%97%A0%E9%9C%80%E8%B5%B0%E5%B7%B2%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%EF%BC%9B1-%E9%9C%80%E9%87%8D%E8%B5%B0%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%EF%BC%8C%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA0","maxLength":"2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"backNodeId","maxLength":"120","label":"%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9ID","desc":"%20%E4%BC%A0%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E8%87%B3%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E4%BA%BA%0A%E6%8C%87%E5%AE%9A%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%EF%BC%8C%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E6%97%B6%E5%88%99%E4%B8%8D%E5%9B%9E%E5%88%B0%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E4%BA%BA%0A%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E5%8F%AF%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E8%8E%B7%E5%BE%97%0A%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E5%9C%A8%E6%B5%81%E7%A8%8B%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E4%B8%AD%E6%9C%80%E6%96%B0%E4%B8%80%E6%AC%A1%E9%87%8D%E6%96%B0%E6%8F%90%E4%BA%A4%E5%90%8E%E7%9A%84%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4%E5%86%85"}}]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"failedCnt","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E4%B8%AA%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"2","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"total","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"2","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"detail","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86%E8%AF%A6%E6%83%85","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2022000000000000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"result","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%201-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9B0-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"failedReason","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0","exampleValue":"%E6%89%BE%E4%B8%8D%E5%88%B0%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E4%BB%BB%E5%8A%A1","desc":""}}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%88%96%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E5%9B%9E%E8%B0%83%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求示例
`{BaseURL}/api/v1/bills/thirdPartCallback?OPAUID=XFT00001`
```json
{
    "billList": [
        {
            "billId": 2022000000000000,
            "status": "1"
        },
        {
            "billId": 2022000000000001,
            "status": "1"
        }
    ]
}
```
### 返回示例
```json
{
    "data": {
        "failedCnt": 2,
        "total": 2,
        "detail": [
            {
                "billId": 2022000000000000,
                "result": "0",
                "failedReason": "找不到对应审批任务"
            },
            {
                "billId": 2022000000000001,
                "result": "0",
                "failedReason": "找不到对应审批任务"
            }
        ]
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "回调成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|-----------|-------------------|-------------------------------|
| 200      | 成功                 | 无                            |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/thirdPartCallback

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/thirdPartCallback

接口描述

费控系统中“推送外部系统”节点会将单据信息推送给外部系统，此时费控中单据会在该审批节点等待，外部系统审批后，需要调用该接口来处理费控中单据的审批状态

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"billList","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2024041714594536","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"status","required":true,"label":"%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%20%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%89%E6%96%B9%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%EF%BC%9A1-%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87%EF%BC%9B3-%E6%8B%92%E7%BB%9D%EF%BC%9BB-%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E","maxLength":"2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"remark","required":false,"label":"%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8","exampleValue":"%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87","desc":"%20%0D%0A%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E4%B8%BA%E6%8B%92%E7%BB%9D%E3%80%81%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%AE%A1%E6%A0%B8%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%AA%E4%BC%A0%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E4%BC%9A%E5%87%BA%E7%8E%B0%E5%A6%82%E4%B8%8B%E6%8A%A5%E9%94%99%EF%BC%9A%E6%8B%92%E7%BB%9D%E3%80%81%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%AE%A1%E6%A0%B8%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E3%80%82","maxLength":"120"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"backTypeFlag","label":"%E9%87%8D%E6%96%B0%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%200-%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E5%90%8E%E6%97%A0%E9%9C%80%E8%B5%B0%E5%B7%B2%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%EF%BC%9B1-%E9%9C%80%E9%87%8D%E8%B5%B0%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%EF%BC%8C%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA0","maxLength":"2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"backNodeId","maxLength":"120","label":"%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9ID","desc":"%20%E4%BC%A0%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E8%87%B3%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E4%BA%BA%0A%E6%8C%87%E5%AE%9A%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%EF%BC%8C%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E6%97%B6%E5%88%99%E4%B8%8D%E5%9B%9E%E5%88%B0%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E4%BA%BA%0A%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E5%8F%AF%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E8%8E%B7%E5%BE%97%0A%E9%80%80%E5%9B%9E%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E5%9C%A8%E6%B5%81%E7%A8%8B%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E4%B8%AD%E6%9C%80%E6%96%B0%E4%B8%80%E6%AC%A1%E9%87%8D%E6%96%B0%E6%8F%90%E4%BA%A4%E5%90%8E%E7%9A%84%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4%E5%86%85"}}]}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"failedCnt","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E4%B8%AA%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"2","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"total","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"2","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"detail","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86%E8%AF%A6%E6%83%85","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2022000000000000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"result","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%201-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9B0-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"failedReason","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0","exampleValue":"%E6%89%BE%E4%B8%8D%E5%88%B0%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E4%BB%BB%E5%8A%A1","desc":""}}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%88%96%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E5%9B%9E%E8%B0%83%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求示例

{BaseURL}/api/v1/bills/thirdPartCallback?OPAUID=XFT00001

{
    "billList": [
        {
            "billId": 2022000000000000,
            "status": "1"
        },
        {
            "billId": 2022000000000001,
            "status": "1"
        }
    ]
}

返回示例

{
    "data": {
        "failedCnt": 2,
        "total": 2,
        "detail": [
            {
                "billId": 2022000000000000,
                "result": "0",
                "failedReason": "找不到对应审批任务"
            },
            {
                "billId": 2022000000000001,
                "result": "0",
                "failedReason": "找不到对应审批任务"
            }
        ]
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "回调成功"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
200 成功 无
